label: SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_phone, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderdate FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F'AND ms.o_totalprice > 100000 ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderstatus, ms.o_orderdate FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_acctbal < 0 AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'O' ORDER BY ms.c_acctbal ASC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment,ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority = '5-LOW'AND ms.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderpriority FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE'AND ms.o_totalprice > 200000 ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_phone, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'P' AND ms.o_shippriority = 0 ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderdate FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND ms.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate ASC, ms.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.c_mktsegment,ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderpriority FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_acctbal > 8000 AND ms.o_orderpriority = '3-MEDIUM' ORDER BY ms.c_acctbal DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.l_orderkey,ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderstatus FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD'AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'F'AND ms.o_totalprice < 20000 ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice ASC;
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC;
SELECT ms.l_shipmode, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY total_cantitate DESC;
SELECT ms.o_orderpriority, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY total_discount DESC;
SELECT ms.l_linestatus, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_linestatus ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;
SELECT ms.o_orderstatus,SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.o_orderstatus ORDER BY total_taxe DESC;
SELECT ms.l_shipinstruct, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipinstruct ORDER BY total_cantitate DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere,EXTRACT (MONTH FROM ms.l_shipdate) AS luna_expediere, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate), EXTRACT (MONTH FROM ms.l_shipdate) ORDER BY an_expediere ASC, luna_expediere ASC;
SELECT ms.o_orderpriority, SUM(ms.o_totalprice) AS total_valoare_finalizata FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY total_valoare_finalizata DESC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, ms.l_shipmode,SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate), ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY an_comanda ASC,total_facturat DESC;
SELECT ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_linestatus,SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_linestatus ORDER BY ms.l_shipmode ASC, total_discount DESC;
SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda,COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC;
SELECT ms.l_shipmode, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY nr_linii DESC;
SELECT ms.o_orderstatus, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.o_orderstatus ORDER BY nr_comenzi DESC;
SELECT ms.o_orderpriority, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY nr_linii DESC;
SELECT ms.l_linestatus,COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_linestatus ORDER BY nr_linii DESC;
SELECT ms.l_shipinstruct, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipinstruct ORDER BY nr_comenzi DESC;
SELECT EXTRACT (MONTH FROM ms.l_shipdate) AS luna_expediere, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (MONTH FROM ms.l_shipdate) ORDER BY luna_expediere ASC;

SELECT EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, ms.o_orderpriority,COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate),ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY an_comanda ASC,nr_comenzi DESC;
SELECT ms.l_shipmode,ms.l_linestatus,COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_linestatus ORDER BY ms.l_shipmode ASC, nr_linii DESC;

SELECT ms.o_orderstatus,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.o_orderstatus, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate) ORDER BY ms.o_orderstatus ASC, an_expediere ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, msu.s_nation_name,SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name, msu.s_nation_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 500000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_quantity) < 15000 ORDER BY total_cantitate ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_linie FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) < 200 ORDER BY pret_minim_linie ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey,msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) > 100000 ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_discount) > 50 ORDER BY total_discount DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MAX(ms.l_tax) AS taxa_maxima FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_tax) >= 0.08 ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MIN(ms.l_quantity) AS cantitate_minima FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MIN(ms.l_quantity) < 2 ORDER BY cantitate_minima ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM master_supplier msu JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey,msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) > 600000 ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name,MAX(ms.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey,msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_quantity) > 45 ORDER BY cantitate_maxima DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM master_supplier msu JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_tax) < 5 ORDER BY total_taxe ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) < 1000 ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MIN(ms.l_discount) AS discount_minim, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MIN(ms.l_discount) = 0 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_quantity) BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000 ORDER BY total_cantitate ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) - MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS spread_pret FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey,msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) - MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) > 90000 ORDER BY spread_pret DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey,msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 200000 ORDER BY total_returnat DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MAX(ms.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima_air FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey WHERE ms.l_shipmode = 'AIR' GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_quantity) > 40 ORDER BY cantitate_maxima_air DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_minima FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MIN(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) < 300 ORDER BY valoare_neta_minima ASC;

SELECT msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe_finalizate FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey WHERE ms.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_tax) > 30 ORDER BY total_taxe_finalizate DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name, MAX(ms.l_discount) AS discount_maxim, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING MAX(ms.l_discount) = 0.10 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT msu.s_name,SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat_truck FROM master_supplier msu INNER JOIN master_sales ms ON msu.ps_suppkey = ms.l_suppkey WHERE ms.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 300000 ORDER BY total_facturat_truck DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name,ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'AIR' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name,ms.c_acctbal, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice, ms.l_returnflag, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND ms.l_returnflag = 'R' ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice DESC, ms.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_phone, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_quantity FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD' AND ms.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_quantity DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.l_orderkey, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_discount, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_acctbal > 7000 AND ms.o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH'AND ms.l_discount = 0.10 ORDER BY ms.c_acctbal DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_shipdate, ms.l_linestatus, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY'AND ms.l_linestatus = 'O' AND ms.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31' ORDER BY ms.l_shipdate ASC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') AND ms.l_shipmode = 'RAIL' ORDER BY ms.o_orderpriority ASC, ms.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice, ms.l_quantity, ms.l_shipmode FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'FURNITURE' AND ms.l_quantity > 40 AND ms.l_shipmode = 'SHIP' ORDER BY ms.l_quantity DESC, ms.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_commitdate, ms.l_receiptdate, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_linestatus = 'O' AND ms.l_receiptdate > ms.l_commitdate AND ms.c_acctbal > 0 ORDER BY ms.l_receiptdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name,ms.c_mktsegment,ms.o_orderdate,ms.o_totalprice,ms.l_shipinstruct,ms.l_tax FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND ms.l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' AND ms.l_tax = 0.08 ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice DESC, ms.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_phone, ms.o_totalprice, ms.o_orderstatus, ms.l_shipinstruct, ms.l_extendedprice FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_totalprice > 150000 AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'P' AND ms.l_shipinstruct = 'NONE' ORDER BY ms.o_totalprice DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;
SELECT msu.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name ORDER BY nr_piese DESC;
SELECT msu.p_type, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.p_type ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;
SELECT msu.p_brand, msu.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.p_brand,msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name ORDER BY msu.p_brand ASC, nr_piese DESC;
SELECT msu.p_container, COUNT(*) AS nr_combinatii FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.p_container ORDER BY nr_combinatii DESC;
SELECT msu.p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.p_size ORDER BY msu.p_size ASC;
SELECT msu.p_mfgr, msu.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.p_mfgr, msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name ORDER BY msu.p_mfgr ASC, nr_piese DESC;
SELECT msu.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' GROUP BY msu.p_brand ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;
SELECT msu.s_name, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese_mici FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_size <= 5 GROUP BY msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name ORDER BY nr_piese_mici DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.p_brand) AS nr_branduri,COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name ORDER BY nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_container, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_container ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) = 1996 GROUP BY ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;
SELECT ms.c_mktsegment, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.c_mktsegment ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' GROUP BY ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal ORDER BY total_taxe DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.l_shipmode, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.c_name, ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY ms.c_name ASC, total_cantitate DESC;
SELECT ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderstatus, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderstatus ORDER BY ms.c_mktsegment ASC, total_discount DESC;
SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_returnat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(DISTINCT ms.o_totalprice) AS total_valoare_urgenta FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY ms.c_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY an_comanda ASC,total_valoare_urgenta DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.l_shipmode, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY ms.c_name, ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;

SELECT ms.c_mktsegment, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate) AS an_expediere, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.c_mktsegment, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.l_shipdate) ORDER BY ms.c_mktsegment ASC, an_expediere ASC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, ms.o_orderpriority, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice)AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;
SELECT c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_cheltuit FROM master_sales WHERE c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c_name HAVING SUM(l_extendedprice) > 500000;
SELECT s_name, SUM(ps_availqty) AS stoc_total_cupru FROM master_supplier WHERE p_type LIKE '%COPPER%' GROUP BY s_name HAVING SUM(ps_availqty) > 8000;
SELECT c_name, COUNT(l_linenumber) AS numar_linii_comanda FROM master_sales WHERE c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' GROUP BY c_name HAVING COUNT(l_linenumber) > 50;
SELECT s_name, COUNT(ps_partkey) AS piese_oferite FROM master_supplier WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#11' GROUP BY s_name HAVING COUNT(ps_partkey) > 10;
SELECT c_name, SUM(l_quantity) AS cantitate_totala FROM master_sales WHERE o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY c_name HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 1000;
SELECT s_name, SUM(ps_supplycost) AS cost_aprovizionare FROM master_supplier WHERE p_size < 10 GROUP BY s_name HAVING SUM(ps_supplycost) > 20000;
SELECT c_name, SUM(l_tax) AS taxe_totale FROM master_sales WHERE o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY c_name HAVING SUM(l_tax) > 10000;
SELECT s_name, SUM(ps_availqty) AS stoc_curent FROM master_supplier WHERE p_mfgr = 'Manufacturer#1' GROUP BY s_name HAVING SUM(ps_availqty) > 15000;
SELECT c_name, SUM(l_discount) AS discount_total FROM master_sales WHERE l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c_name HAVING SUM(l_discount) > 500;
SELECT c_name, o_orderdate, COUNT(l_linenumber) AS expedieri_aer FROM master_sales WHERE l_shipmode = 'AIR' GROUP BY c_name, o_orderdate HAVING COUNT(l_linenumber) > 30;
SELECT c_name, MAX(l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie FROM master_sales WHERE c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' GROUP BY c_name ORDER BY pret_maxim_linie DESC;
SELECT p_type, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS cost_minim FROM master_supplier GROUP BY p_type ORDER BY cost_minim ASC;
SELECT o_clerk, MAX(l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima FROM master_sales GROUP BY o_clerk ORDER BY cantitate_maxima DESC;
SELECT p_mfgr, MIN(p_retailprice) AS cel_mai_ieftin_retail FROM master_supplier GROUP BY p_mfgr ORDER BY cel_mai_ieftin_retail ASC;
SELECT l_shipmode, MAX(l_discount) AS discount_maxim FROM master_sales GROUP BY l_shipmode ORDER BY discount_maxim DESC;
SELECT p_size, MIN(ps_availqty) AS stoc_minim FROM master_supplier GROUP BY p_size ORDER BY stoc_minim ASC;
SELECT c_nation_name AS n_name, MAX(o_totalprice) AS comanda_record FROM master_sales GROUP BY c_nation_name ORDER BY comanda_record DESC;
SELECT s_nation_name AS n_name, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS cel_mai_bun_cost FROM master_supplier GROUP BY s_nation_name ORDER BY cel_mai_bun_cost ASC;
SELECT o_orderpriority, MAX(l_tax) AS taxa_maxima FROM master_sales GROUP BY o_orderpriority ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC;
SELECT p_brand, MAX(s_acctbal) AS sold_maxim_furnizor FROM master_supplier WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#12' GROUP BY p_brand ORDER BY sold_maxim_furnizor DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.c_nation_name, ms.c_region_name FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE' AND ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'AIR' AND ms.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_acctbal, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_totalprice, ms.l_returnflag, ms.l_discount, ms.c_nation_name, ms.c_region_name FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' AND ms.l_returnflag = 'R' AND ms.l_discount > 0.07 AND ms.c_region_name = 'ASIA' ORDER BY ms.l_discount DESC, ms.o_totalprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_shipmode, ms.l_quantity, ms.c_nation_name, ms.c_region_name FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'SHIP' AND ms.o_orderdate > '1997-01-01' AND ms.c_region_name = 'AMERICA' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_quantity DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_shipmode, msu.s_name, msu.s_acctbal FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'AIR' AND msu.s_acctbal > 5000 ORDER BY ms.l_extendedprice DESC, ms.o_orderdate DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_discount, msu.s_name, msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE msu.s_nation_name = 'GERMANY' AND ms.l_discount > 0.05 AND ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' ORDER BY ms.l_extendedprice DESC, ms.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT ms.c_name, msu.s_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_shipmode, ms.c_nation_name AS nat_client, msu.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor, ms.c_region_name AS regiune FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.c_region_name = msu.s_region_name AND ms.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' AND ms.l_shipmode = 'RAIL' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, msu.s_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_returnflag, ms.c_nation_name AS nat_client, msu.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.c_nation_name = 'FRANCE' AND msu.s_nation_name = 'GERMANY' AND ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_quantity, msu.p_name, msu.p_type, ms.c_nation_name, ms.c_region_name FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_partkey = msu.ps_partkey WHERE msu.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' AND ms.c_region_name = 'MIDDLE EAST' AND ms.l_quantity > 20 ORDER BY ms.l_extendedprice DESC, ms.o_orderdate ASC;

SELECT ms.c_name, ms.c_mktsegment, msu.s_name, msu.s_acctbal, ms.o_orderdate, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_shipmode, ms.c_nation_name AS nat_client, ms.c_region_name FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.c_mktsegment = 'HOUSEHOLD' AND ms.c_region_name = 'AFRICA' AND msu.s_acctbal > 7000 AND ms.l_shipmode = 'TRUCK' ORDER BY msu.s_acctbal DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_name, msu.s_name, ms.o_orderdate, ms.o_orderpriority, ms.l_extendedprice, ms.l_shipmode, ms.c_nation_name AS nat_client, msu.s_nation_name AS nat_furnizor, ms.c_region_name AS regiune_comuna FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.c_region_name = msu.s_region_name AND ms.c_region_name = 'AMERICA' AND ms.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH') AND ms.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL') ORDER BY ms.o_orderdate DESC, ms.l_extendedprice DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, ms.o_orderstatus, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus IN ('F','O') GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, ms.o_orderstatus ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, ms.l_shipmode, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP') GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, nr_linii DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, msu.p_type, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_type LIKE '%STEEL%' OR msu.p_type LIKE '%BRASS%' GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name, msu.p_type ORDER BY msu.s_nation_name ASC, nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, ms.o_orderpriority, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM') GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_brand IN ('Brand#12','Brand#23','Brand#34','Brand#45') GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_brand ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, ms.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.c_name) AS nr_clienti_activi FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, ms.c_mktsegment ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, nr_clienti_activi DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii_returnate FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.c_name) AS nr_clienti, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.c_nation_name IN ('FRANCE','GERMANY') AND msu.s_nation_name IN ('FRANCE','GERMANY') GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, msu.s_nation_name ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, msu.s_nation_name ASC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_container, msu.p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 15 GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_container, msu.p_size ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, nr_piese DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.c_name) AS nr_clienti FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1994-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, nr_comenzi DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, ms.l_shipmode, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP','MAIL') GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, ms.l_linestatus, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.l_linestatus IN ('F','O') GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name, ms.l_linestatus ORDER BY msu.s_nation_name ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, ms.o_orderpriority, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM','4-NOT SPECIFIED','5-LOW') GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, total_discount DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) BETWEEN 1995 AND 1996 GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, msu.s_nation_name ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta_totala FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name ORDER BY valoare_neta_totala DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, msu.p_brand, SUM(ms.l_quantity) AS total_cantitate, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE msu.p_brand IN ('Brand#12','Brand#23','Brand#34','Brand#45','Brand#55') GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name, msu.p_brand ORDER BY msu.s_nation_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_mktsegment, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY ms.c_mktsegment, msu.s_region_name ORDER BY ms.c_mktsegment ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.p_type, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_partkey = msu.ps_partkey WHERE msu.p_type LIKE 'STANDARD%' OR msu.p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.p_type ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) AS an_comanda, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, msu.s_region_name ASC, an_comanda ASC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 5000000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi_urgente FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) > 500 ORDER BY nr_comenzi_urgente DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, msu.s_name, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.l_linestatus = 'F' GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name, msu.ps_suppkey, msu.s_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_tax) > 40 ORDER BY msu.s_nation_name ASC, total_taxe DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) AS valoare_neta FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE EXTRACT (YEAR FROM ms.o_orderdate) BETWEEN 1994 AND 1997 GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, msu.s_nation_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice * (1 - ms.l_discount)) > 1000000 ORDER BY valoare_neta DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_discount) AS total_discount FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY msu.s_region_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_discount) > 1000 ORDER BY total_discount DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_brand, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) AS nr_furnizori FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 20 GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_brand HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_suppkey) > 3 ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, nr_furnizori DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, ms.c_mktsegment, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_returnat FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, ms.c_mktsegment HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 2000000 ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, total_returnat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, COUNT(*) AS nr_linii_returnate FROM master_sales ms JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 500 ORDER BY nr_linii_returnate DESC;

SELECT msu.p_type, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, COUNT(DISTINCT msu.ps_partkey) AS nr_piese FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_partkey = msu.ps_partkey WHERE ms.c_region_name = 'EUROPE' GROUP BY msu.p_type HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 1500000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) AS total_facturat, SUM(ms.l_tax) AS total_taxe, COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) AS nr_comenzi FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name HAVING SUM(ms.l_extendedprice) > 10000000 AND COUNT(DISTINCT ms.l_orderkey) > 1000 ORDER BY total_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, ms.l_shipmode, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.l_shipmode IN ('AIR','RAIL','TRUCK','SHIP','MAIL','FOB','REG AIR') GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, ms.l_shipmode ORDER BY pret_maxim DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, ms.o_orderpriority, MAX(ms.l_quantity) AS cantitate_maxima, MIN(ms.l_quantity) AS cantitate_minima FROM master_sales ms WHERE ms.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT','2-HIGH','3-MEDIUM','4-NOT SPECIFIED','5-LOW') GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, ms.o_orderpriority ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, cantitate_maxima DESC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_mfgr, MAX(msu.p_retailprice) AS pret_maxim_catalog, MIN(msu.p_retailprice) AS pret_minim_catalog FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_mfgr IN ('Manufacturer#1','Manufacturer#2','Manufacturer#3','Manufacturer#4','Manufacturer#5') GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_mfgr ORDER BY msu.s_region_name ASC, pret_maxim_catalog DESC;

SELECT msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, msu.p_brand, MAX(msu.ps_supplycost) AS cost_maxim_aprovizionare, MIN(msu.ps_supplycost) AS cost_minim_aprovizionare FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.p_size BETWEEN 5 AND 25 GROUP BY msu.s_nation_name, msu.p_brand ORDER BY cost_maxim_aprovizionare DESC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, msu.s_nation_name AS natiune_furnizor, MAX(ms.l_discount) AS discount_maxim, MIN(ms.l_discount) AS discount_minim FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderstatus = 'F' GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, msu.s_nation_name ORDER BY discount_maxim DESC, ms.c_nation_name ASC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.p_type, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_linie, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_linie FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_partkey = msu.ps_partkey WHERE msu.p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' OR msu.p_type LIKE 'STANDARD%' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.p_type ORDER BY ms.c_region_name ASC, pret_maxim_linie DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, MAX(ms.l_tax) AS taxa_maxima, MIN(ms.l_tax) AS taxa_minima FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1994-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name ORDER BY taxa_maxima DESC, ms.c_region_name ASC;

SELECT msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_container, MAX(msu.ps_availqty) AS stoc_maxim, MIN(msu.ps_availqty) AS stoc_minim FROM master_supplier msu WHERE msu.ps_availqty > 0 GROUP BY msu.s_region_name, msu.p_container ORDER BY stoc_maxim DESC, msu.s_region_name ASC;

SELECT ms.c_nation_name AS natiune_client, msu.p_mfgr AS producator, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim_facturat, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim_facturat FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_partkey = msu.ps_partkey WHERE msu.p_mfgr IN ('Manufacturer#1','Manufacturer#2','Manufacturer#3','Manufacturer#4','Manufacturer#5') GROUP BY ms.c_nation_name, msu.p_mfgr ORDER BY ms.c_nation_name ASC, pret_maxim_facturat DESC;

SELECT ms.c_region_name AS regiune_client, msu.s_region_name AS regiune_furnizor, msu.p_mfgr AS producator, MAX(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_maxim, MIN(ms.l_extendedprice) AS pret_minim, MAX(ms.l_discount) AS discount_maxim, MIN(ms.l_discount) AS discount_minim FROM master_sales ms INNER JOIN master_supplier msu ON ms.l_suppkey = msu.ps_suppkey WHERE ms.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' GROUP BY ms.c_region_name, msu.s_region_name, msu.p_mfgr ORDER BY pret_maxim DESC, ms.c_region_name ASC;
